mapper.select: SELECT * FROM board_categories WHERE active=1 ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM board_categories WHERE slug=%s AND active=1

SELECT p.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_attachments WHERE post_id=p.id) AS attach_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_comments WHERE post_id=p.id AND is_deleted=0) AS comment_count FROM board_posts p WHERE p.category_id=%s AND p.is_deleted=0 ORDER BY p.is_pinned DESC, p.created_at DESC LIMIT %s OFFSET %s
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM board_posts WHERE category_id=%s AND is_deleted=0
SELECT * FROM board_posts WHERE id=%s AND is_deleted=0
mapper.update: UPDATE board_posts SET view_count=view_count+1 WHERE id=%s
mapper.select: SELECT id, filename, file_size, mime_type, created_at FROM board_attachments WHERE post_id=%s
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_posts (category_id, author_id, author_name, is_admin, title, content, is_pinned) VALUES (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s) RETURNING id
INSERT INTO board_attachments (post_id, filename, saved_name, file_size, mime_type) VALUES (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM board_posts WHERE id=%s AND is_deleted=0
mapper.update: UPDATE board_posts SET title=%s, content=%s, is_pinned=%s, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=%s
mapper.select: SELECT saved_name FROM board_attachments WHERE id=%s AND post_id=%s
mapper.update: UPDATE board_posts SET is_deleted=1 WHERE id=%s
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM board_attachments WHERE id=%s AND post_id=%s
SELECT * FROM board_categories ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order),0)+1 as max_so FROM board_categories
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_categories (name, slug, description, icon, allow_write, sort_order) VALUES (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s) RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE board_categories SET name=%s, slug=%s, description=%s, icon=%s, allow_write=%s, active=%s, sort_order=%s WHERE id=%s
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_attachments WHERE post_id=p.id) AS attach_count FROM board_posts p JOIN board_categories c ON c.id=p.category_id WHERE p.is_deleted=0 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT %s OFFSET %s
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM board_posts p WHERE p.is_deleted=0
mapper.update: UPDATE board_posts SET is_deleted=1 WHERE id=%s
UPDATE board_posts SET is_pinned=%s WHERE id=%s
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM board_comments WHERE post_id=%s AND is_deleted=0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT id FROM board_posts WHERE id=%s AND is_deleted=0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_comments (post_id, author_id, author_name, is_admin, content) VALUES (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s) RETURNING id
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM board_comments WHERE id=%s AND is_deleted=0
mapper.update: UPDATE board_comments SET content=%s, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=%s
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM board_comments WHERE id=%s AND is_deleted=0
mapper.update: UPDATE board_comments SET is_deleted=1 WHERE id=%s
